name: HWR_DI_ADAPTER_VL
query: SELECT B.ADAPTER_ID, B.SOURCE_ID, B.UUID, B.ADAPTER_NAME, B.ADAPTER_QUERY, B.SOURCE_OBJECT_DEF, B.TARGET_OBJECT_DEF, B.QUERY_NAME, T.DESCRIPTION, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER FROM HWR_DI_ADAPTER_B B, HWR_DI_ADAPTER_TL T WHERE B.ADAPTER_ID = T.ADAPTER_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
